title: rawhide: run with --uidmap: container init caused ... operation not permitted
body:
Just a heads-up about rawhide:
```
# podman run --rm alpine true
[ ok ]

# podman run --rm --uidmap 0:100:10000 alpine true
Error: time="2019-07-31T21:47:03-04:00" level=warning msg="signal: killed"
time="2019-07-31T21:47:03-04:00" level=error msg="container_linux.go:346: starting container process caused \"process_linux.go:449: container init caused \\\"rootfs_linux.go:58: mounting \\\\\\\"sysfs\\\\\\\" to rootfs \\\\\\\"/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/abc9cfd9515c80731af19b9e50beb60697a8f51a74a64e71a79b10c652457127/merged\\\\\\\" at \\\\\\\"/sys\\\\\\\" caused \\\\\\\"operation not permitted\\\\\\\"\\\"\"\n"
container_linux.go:346: starting container process caused "process_linux.go:449: container init caused \"rootfs_linux.go:58: mounting \\\"sysfs\\\" to rootfs \\\"/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/abc9cfd9515c80731af19b9e50beb60697a8f51a74a64e71a79b10c652457127/merged\\\" at \\\"/sys\\\" caused \\\"operation not permitted\\\"\""
: OCI runtime error
```
Seems to be kernel: 5.3.0-0.rc1.git3.1.fc31 demonstrates this, 5.1.0-0.rc1 does not. (But other things may have changed in the reboot, so I can't be sure. I can't narrow it down further; simply upgrading kernel on my virt, without a full dnf upgrade, yields an unbootable system).

It is not podman-related: both podman-1.4.5-0.29.dev.gitd6b41eb.fc31 and 1.4.5-0.59.dev.git680a383.fc31 exhibit the same behavior.

comments.body:
It looks like a regression in the kernel.

On Fedora 30:

```
# strace -f -e mount podman run --rm --uidmap 0:100:10000 alpine echo hi 2>&1 | grep sysfs
[pid 21824] mount("sysfs", "/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/6e099c50ca5cea49d87b5adcd6c5ff1d84bc538df686f573324f609ab6474245/merged/sys", "sysfs", MS_RDONLY|MS_NOSUID|MS_NODEV|MS_NOEXEC, NULL) = 0

```

On Rawhide with 5.3.0-0.rc1.git3.1.fc31:

```
# strace -f -e mount podman run --rm --uidmap 0:100:10000 alpine echo hi 2>&1 | grep sysfs
[pid  5820] mount("sysfs", "/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/c982a6703624fa1e2a596211823d864311fd20675e20133f48ddf68ee97e185b/merged/sys", "sysfs", MS_RDONLY|MS_NOSUID|MS_NODEV|MS_NOEXEC, NULL) = -1 EPERM (Operation not permitted)

```
This issue had no activity for 30 days. In the absence of activity or the "do-not-close" label, the issue will be automatically closed within 7 days.
Closing since it seems to be fixed in Rawhide now.
